mapper.select:
SELECT A.CONTENTID ,TITLE, ADDR1 , A.CONTENTTYPEID, B.CONTENTDIV , FIRSTIMAGE , NVL(C.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) AS REVIEWCOUNT , NVL(AVG_RATING, 0) AS AVGRATING , D.EVENTSTARTDATE AS EVENTSTARTDATE , D.EVENTENDDATE AS EVENTENDDATE , CASE WHEN E.CONTENTID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BOOKMARK FROM CONTENT A JOIN CONTENTCATEGORY B ON A.CONTENTTYPEID = B.CONTENTTYPEID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CONTENTID, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_COUNT, AVG(NVL(RATING, 0)) AS AVG_RATING FROM CONTENT_REVIEW WHERE BLIND_YN = 'N' GROUP BY CONTENTID ) C ON A.CONTENTID = C.CONTENTID LEFT JOIN CONTENTEVENT D ON A.CONTENTID = D.CONTENTID LEFT JOIN MEMBER_BOOKMARK E ON A.CONTENTID = E.CONTENTID AND E.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
ORDER BY A.MODIFIEDTIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT A.CONTENTID ,TITLE, ADDR1, ADDR2 , A.CONTENTTYPEID, B.CONTENTDIV , MAPX, MAPY , FIRSTIMAGE, FIRSTIMAGE2 , NVL(C.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) AS REVIEWCOUNT , NVL(AVG_RATING, 0) AS AVGRATING , D.EVENTSTARTDATE AS EVENTSTARTDATE , D.EVENTENDDATE AS EVENTENDDATE , CASE WHEN E.CONTENTID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BOOKMARK FROM CONTENT A JOIN CONTENTCATEGORY B ON A.CONTENTTYPEID = B.CONTENTTYPEID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CONTENTID, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_COUNT, AVG(NVL(RATING, 0)) AS AVG_RATING FROM CONTENT_REVIEW WHERE BLIND_YN = 'N' GROUP BY CONTENTID ) C ON A.CONTENTID = C.CONTENTID LEFT JOIN CONTENTEVENT D ON A.CONTENTID = D.CONTENTID LEFT JOIN MEMBER_BOOKMARK E ON A.CONTENTID = E.CONTENTID AND E.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE A.CONTENTID = #{contentId}
SELECT CONTENTIMAGEID, ORIGINIMGURL, IMGNAME FROM CONTENTIMAGE WHERE APIID = (SELECT APIID FROM CONTENT WHERE CONTENTID = #{contentId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_BOOKMARK(BOOKMARK_NO, MEMBER_NO, CONTENTID) VALUES(MEMBER_BOOKMARK_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{contentId})
mapper.delete: DELETE MEMBER_BOOKMARK WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND CONTENTID = #{contentId}
